operations.value: Short-term randomized trials generally report good tolerability, but mild gastrointestinal symptoms and drowsiness can occur, and the available trial evidence does not establish long-term safety across products or populations.
operations.notes: The statement separates short-term trial tolerability from the unresolved question of long-term and product-wide safety.

sources.title: Safety and efficacy of Withania somnifera for anxiety and insomnia: Systematic review and meta-analysis

notes: Adds a balanced short-term tolerability and long-term uncertainty claim.
